reason: Code quality check reference for backend behavior and verification.
Code quality check reference for frontend build/test and Playwright visual self-acceptance.

issue: 第三货架观测站 rules 后端回复像系统提示，不像角色聊天
evidence: backend/src/fablemap_api/application/services/runtime.py::_rules_response echoed clean_text(message) and tavern.scene_prompt in `这里的气味和灯光让我想到...` fallback.

backend/src/fablemap_api/core/public_welfare_rules.py::resolve_public_welfare_rules_response used all-tavern generic fallback when public-welfare tavern keywords did not match, so `天气怎么样` did not stay in the alien convenience-store voice.
fix: Route both native v1 and core web rules fallback through shared public-welfare rules resolver; use tavern-specific fallback copy when a built-in public-welfare ruleset exists; never append scene_prompt in rules fallback.
